'''âz-t-ch''' ('''kazatach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quartersaw|quartersaw]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-t-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quartersaw|quartersaw]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-t-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kazatach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizatach|thizatach]] || [[word:jizatach|jizatach]] || [[word:shizatach|shizatach]] || [[word:kizatach|kizatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzatach|thuthuzatach]] || [[word:jujuzatach|jujuzatach]] || [[word:shushuzatach|shushuzatach]] || [[word:kukuzatach|kukuzatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzatach|thuzatach]] || [[word:juzatach|juzatach]] || [[word:shuzatach|shuzatach]] || [[word:kuzatach|kuzatach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzatach|thuzatach]] || [[word:juzatach|juzatach]] || [[word:shuzatach|shuzatach]] || [[word:kuzatach|kuzatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezatach|thezatach]] || [[word:jezatach|jezatach]] || [[word:shezatach|shezatach]] || [[word:kezatach|kezatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozatach|thothozatach]] || [[word:jojozatach|jojozatach]] || [[word:shoshozatach|shoshozatach]] || [[word:kokozatach|kokozatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozatach|thozatach]] || [[word:jozatach|jozatach]] || [[word:shozatach|shozatach]] || [[word:kozatach|kozatach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozatach|thozatach]] || [[word:jozatach|jozatach]] || [[word:shozatach|shozatach]] || [[word:kozatach|kozatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzatach|thĂŠzatach]] || [[word:jĂŠzatach|jĂŠzatach]] || [[word:shĂŠzatach|shĂŠzatach]] || [[word:kĂŠzatach|kĂŠzatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazatach|thathazatach]] || [[word:jajazatach|jajazatach]] || [[word:shashazatach|shashazatach]] || [[word:kakazatach|kakazatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazatach|thazatach]] || [[word:jazatach|jazatach]] || [[word:shazatach|shazatach]] || [[word:kazatach|kazatach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazatach|thazatach]] || [[word:jazatach|jazatach]] || [[word:shazatach|shazatach]] || [[word:kazatach|kazatach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazatach|shazatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazatach|goshazatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazatach|gokishazatach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazatachnĂŒ|shazatachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazatachnknĂŒ|goshazatachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatachnĂŒ|gokishazatachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazatachshĂ«|shazatachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazatachnkshĂ«|goshazatachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazatachshĂ«|gokishazatachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatachro|shazatachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatachnkro|goshazatachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatachro|gokishazatachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatachmu|shazatachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatachnkmu|goshazatachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatachmu|gokishazatachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazatachsher|shazatachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazatachnksher|goshazatachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazatachsher|gokishazatachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazatachng|shazatachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazatachnkng|goshazatachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazatachng|gokishazatachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazatachya|shazatachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazatachnkya|goshazatachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazatachya|gokishazatachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazatachyam|shazatachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazatachnkyam|goshazatachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazatachyam|gokishazatachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatachnĂŒshĂ«|shazatachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazatachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazatachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatachnĂŒro|shazatachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatachnknĂŒro|goshazatachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatachnĂŒro|gokishazatachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatachnĂŒmu|shazatachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatachnknĂŒmu|goshazatachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatachnĂŒmu|gokishazatachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatachshĂ«nĂŒ|shazatachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazatachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazatachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatachshĂ«ro|shazatachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatachnkshĂ«ro|goshazatachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatachshĂ«ro|gokishazatachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatachshĂ«mu|shazatachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatachnkshĂ«mu|goshazatachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatachshĂ«mu|gokishazatachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatachronĂŒ|shazatachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatachnkronĂŒ|goshazatachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatachronĂŒ|gokishazatachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatachroshĂ«|shazatachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatachnkroshĂ«|goshazatachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatachroshĂ«|gokishazatachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazatachromu|shazatachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazatachnkromu|goshazatachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazatachromu|gokishazatachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazatachmunĂŒ|shazatachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazatachnkmunĂŒ|goshazatachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazatachmunĂŒ|gokishazatachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazatachmushĂ«|shazatachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazatachnkmushĂ«|goshazatachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazatachmushĂ«|gokishazatachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazatachmuro|shazatachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazatachnkmuro|goshazatachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazatachmuro|gokishazatachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
